email:
From: customer3@example.com
Subject: Shipping status
Body: When will my package for order #999 arrive? It's been 5 business days already.

result.reply: Thank you for reaching out about your order #999. Typically, shipments take 5-7 business days to arrive. Since it's been 5 business days, your package should be arriving very soon. I'll check the tracking information for you and get back with an update shortly.
result.next_step: Please wait for my follow-up email with the tracking details. If you don't receive your package within the next two business days, contact us again for further assistance.
